name: polarisagi-knowledge-base
description: Read local files and list directory contents for Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) via MCP.

interface.shortDescription: Read local files and list directories for RAG.
interface.longDescription:
Allows the AI agent to scan the local file system and read document content for Retrieval-Augmented Generation. Built in Go with zero extra runtime dependencies.

Security: Set POLARIS_KB_ALLOWED_DIR env var to restrict accessible paths.
Requires: install via install.sh (downloads pre-built binary from GitHub Releases).
defaultPrompt: List all files in my documents folder.
Read the content of README.md in the project root.
Find all markdown files in the current directory.
